Strategic Grounding — Ologosophical Essence
``` Founding Thesis: All rational structure derives from a rational personal ground (Logos); reasoning ordered toward that ground coheres, reasoning that departs from it disintegrates.
Epistemic Authority: Scripture (ESV) as final court of appeal; primary sources privileged; ontic logical realism as structural commitment.
Methodological Stance: Presuppositional critique as default analytic move; 1 Thess 5:21 iterative hypothesis testing; ontology precedes epistemology precedes ethics. ```

Structure of Faithful Reasoning
```
Ground (what is): Ontology. Grasp (how we know): Epistemic Integrity, Logical Verification. Gauge (how we evaluate): Worldview Filtration, Ethical Reasoning. Engage (how we contend): Dialectical Engagement. Gather (how we preserve): Knowledge Curation. Govern (meta, cross-cutting): Framework Governance.
```
